methodology: Secret-free, CPU-only evaluation fixture pack. Each case replays a real PromptABI verification config that models a known benchmark-interface failure mode before scores are trusted or published.

cases.display_name: Benchmark stop strings differ from serving stop policy
cases.evidence: Harness stops are replayed against the configured stop-policy artifact and must produce evaluation-harness-stop-policy-mismatch.

cases.display_name: Evaluation answer parser points at the wrong schema contract
cases.evidence: The unsafe harness declares an answer schema name that cannot be matched to the JSON Schema artifact used by the grader.

cases.display_name: Benchmark context construction drops required RAG evidence
cases.evidence: The RAG evaluation fixture replays citation loss, payload truncation, overlap accounting, and template-overhead diagnostics from real artifact contracts.

cases.display_name: Few-shot benchmark content can forge model role delimiters
cases.evidence: The ChatML-style unsafe template is replayed through role-boundary non-forgeability and yields concrete assistant delimiter witnesses.

cases.display_name: Evaluation tokenizer pin does not match serving tokenizer
cases.evidence: The unsafe harness tokenizer name is compared against the configured tokenizer artifact family and must report tokenizer mismatch.
